title: 6sense rollout and Salesforce integration across five regions
meta: US Signal | Director, Revenue Operations | Sep 2024 to Mar 2026
description: Led the 6sense rollout with Salesforce integration and SSO across five sales regions during a post-acquisition integration. Reached 175 qualified accounts in core and 225 in non-core markets by Q4 2025.
supports: Also supports: Marketing Operations, Sales Development
